---
title: "NPOR: Analysis of condition complexity"
author: jellevanderwerff
date: 04/04/2022
output:
    html_notebook:
        code_folding: hide
---


```{r}
# for easy loading of packages
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

# load packages
p_load("stringr", "ini", "gdata", "plyr", "dplyr", "here", "ggplot2", "car", "emmeans", "sjPlot")

# for relative file paths (e.g. here('Input', 'file.csv'))
here::i_am(file.path("stats", "group_variability.Rmd"))

# select correct here
here <- here::here

# Load custom helper functions
source(here("scripts", "helper_functions.R"))

# Set theme
source(here("scripts", "jelle_ggplot_theme.R"))

# Load dataframe
df.bytrial <- read.csv(here("data", "experiment", "processed", "ITIs_bytrial.csv"))
df.bytrial$condition <- paste(df.bytrial$stim_tempo_intended, df.bytrial$length, sep = "_")
```



```{r anova}

mod <- aov(edit_distance_norm_q ~ condition, data = df.bytrial)
summary(mod)

# post-hoc
sjPlot::plot_model(mod, type = "pred", terms = c("condition"), show.values = TRUE, show.p = TRUE)

```

```{r plot}

```
